title: Inventory Risk
description: Identify slow-moving and at-risk inventory to reduce stockouts and overstock.

title: Alerts
description: Surface operational signals for inventory, sales, and data-quality events.

title: Product 360
description: Provide a unified product view across sales, inventory, and category signals.

title: Forecasting
description: Prepare demand forecasting evidence for planning and decision support.

title: Anomaly Detection
description: Detect unusual demand, pricing, and inventory patterns in retail data.

title: Platform Health
description: Show frontend, API, database, and local environment readiness for delivery checks.
